message:
fix(extensions): increase runtime risk explanation time budget for CI determinism

Raise RUNTIME_RISK_EXPLANATION_TIME_BUDGET_MS from 2ms to 25ms to keep
runtime fallback behavior deterministic under normal CI/workstation
variance. The previous 2ms budget was too tight, causing non-deterministic
fallback activation on slower CI runners.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
